next_steps: Perform microscopic examination of skin scrapings for Sarcoptes scabiei mites, eggs, or scybala
Obtain RPR and treponemal antibody testing for syphilis
Initiate empiric treatment with topical 5% permethrin cream
Obtain HIV testing and other sexual health screenings
Provide patient education on environmental hygiene and clothing laundering
Arrange for isolation or appropriate management of the patient's living situation to prevent transmission within the shelter
